name: Soft Watercolor
description: Portraits, lifestyle, weddings — gentle wash, high preservation.

prompt.positive: loose watercolor painting, gestural soft brushstrokes, watercolor wash, white paper texture, minimal detail, painterly, expressive, hand-painted, traditional watercolor on cold-press paper
prompt.negative: photo, photograph, photorealistic, hyperdetailed, traced edges, lineart, sketch, cross-hatching, stippling, dots, speckled skin, plastic skin, harsh sharp edges, oversaturated, low quality, blurry, deformed
